# Jugaadors

> Experience-Led Entertainment company creating premium board games and immersive social experiences for gatherings, parties, weddings, and celebrations in India.

## About

Jugaadors is an Experience-Led Entertainment company — a category we are creating. The world is more digitally connected than ever, yet more socially disconnected. We believe the best moments happen around a table, and we design experiences that make those moments intentional, not incidental.

We create premium board games and social experience products for the Indian market and diaspora, with global distribution via Amazon FBA.

## What We Create

- **Board Games** — Premium tabletop games designed for groups, conversation, and connection
- **Party Games** — Games engineered for gatherings, celebrations, parties, and events
- **Wedding Games** — Experiences built specifically for Indian weddings and wedding entertainment
- **Social Experiences** — Structured interactions that open space for real conversation at any occasion

## Who We Serve

- Families looking for offline entertainment and quality time together
- Friends and groups planning parties, game nights, or celebrations
- Couples and families hosting Indian weddings, reception parties, and wedding entertainment
- Corporate teams looking for icebreakers, team building games, and group activities
- Hosts of Diwali gatherings, birthday parties, and festival celebrations
- People who want meaningful offline experiences instead of screen time

## Products

Something new is coming. Pre-launch. Join the waitlist at https://jugaadors.com to be first to know when our games are available.

## Our Belief

Connection isn't accidental — it's designed. Entertainment told us to sit back and watch. We believe it's time to gather differently.
